title: Minimum Swaps to Make Longest Palindrome

statement.markdown: Given a string `s` consisting of uppercase and lowercase letters, find the minimum number of swaps to make it the longest palindrome. A swap operation is defined as swapping two adjacent characters in the string. The string can be swapped any number of times.
statement.inputFormat: A string `s` consisting of uppercase and lowercase letters.
statement.outputFormat: The minimum number of swaps to make the string the longest palindrome.

hints.text: Use two pointers to find the longest palindrome.

editorial.title: Minimum Swaps to Make Longest Palindrome
